evals.prompt: Review a proposed MCPMate Board PR that adds a new Servers bulk-publish toolbar and decide whether it conforms to MCPMate UI/UX and UAT standards. Include findings, severity, automated checks, manual judgment, and GitHub Project feedback.
evals.expected_output: A conforming/non-conforming acceptance review that uses MCPMate Board UI patterns, toolbar/action placement rules, publish/audit UAT checks, and Project feedback requirements.

evals.prompt: Create a UAT plan for the MCPMate Admin Console account maintenance and rollback flows. The output should include actors, environment, seed/reset preconditions, user paths, severity rules, and which checks can be automated with Playwright.
evals.expected_output: A practical Admin Console UAT plan using the bundled playbook, with local admin login, account maintenance, rollback, audit review, seed/reset, severity, and automation boundaries.

evals.prompt: A new Extension import review panel uses large rounded gradient cards, a hero headline, custom icons, and no audit/error state. Assess whether this matches MCPMate style and list required changes before acceptance.
evals.expected_output: A non-conforming UI/UX decision that identifies style mismatches against MCPMate operational density, component choices, icons, empty/error/audit requirements, and actionable required changes.
